creator: freebsd-ports@dan.me.uk
text:
Created attachment 222214
Update ircu to u2.10.12.19

Update ircu to u2.10.12.19.

Fix master site due to move from sourceforge to github - doesn't seem to follow standard github location, so manual path added to the rolled tarball from undernet coder-com.

Also build with GCC rather than clang to fix broken builds (segfaults when running table_gen) - I don't like pulling in GCC but better than no build.

Poudriere testport logs for 11/12 i386/amd64 located at:

https://pkg-builder.dan.net.uk/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/undernet-ircu/2.10.12.19/
